days.summary: Work focused on hardening login flows while tightening the workspace todo panel. The changes added application-level error boundaries, login modal fixes, and repeated cleanup of todo behavior in the codebase workspace sidebar.
frontendChangeBullets: Hardened login flows so repeated hook behavior is less likely to disrupt the authentication experience.
Fixed login modal stability issues to make sign-in interactions feel more dependable.
Added application-level error boundaries so UI failures can be contained instead of breaking the entire app experience.
Improved the workspace todo panel with cleaner behavior and more reliable sidebar updates.
Strengthened routing resilience around key workspace and login paths so users are less likely to hit broken navigation states.
backendChangeBullets: Improved the runtime safety net around app-level failures by adding error-boundary coverage for critical application paths.
Tightened login-related state handling so repeated hook execution is less likely to create unstable authentication behavior.
Stabilized the data and update flow behind the workspace todo sidebar.
Improved route handling around login and workspace paths to better tolerate error cases.
Cleaned up todo behavior in the workspace sidebar so state updates are more consistent across repeated interactions.

days.summary: The day recorded the merge of the feature-session branch, bringing the ongoing session-related work into the main history without additional file-level changes shown in the merge commit.
frontendChangeBullets: Brought the latest session-focused product work into the main ORGII experience for broader use.
Consolidated session improvements so the workspace could build on the newest session behavior.
Made ongoing session-related UI work available to the main application flow.
Aligned the main product line with the latest session experience updates.
Prepared the workspace experience to benefit from the recently completed session-focused changes.
backendChangeBullets: Integrated session-focused runtime work into the main code history so it can support broader workspace behavior.
Consolidated underlying session improvements for use across the application.
Aligned the main runtime code path with the latest session-related foundation work.
Brought session infrastructure updates into the shared application baseline.
Prepared backend session behavior to support subsequent workspace and workflow improvements.

days.summary: Development centered on broad UI stabilization for the codebase workspace and project setup flows, followed by targeted replay and todo fixes. Work touched project selection, repository selection, work item modals, feedback and notification hooks, chat history, workspace layout, replay slider performance, drag responsiveness, invalid date handling, and countdown behavior.
frontendChangeBullets: Stabilized project setup flows for selecting projects, choosing repositories, and filling work item details.
Improved workspace replay performance so interactive review controls feel more responsive.
Reduced drag lag in replay and workspace controls for smoother user interaction.
Fixed invalid date and countdown behavior in todo and workspace panels.
Polished feedback, notification, chat history, and workspace layout interactions for a more cohesive daily experience.
backendChangeBullets: Improved the data handling behind project selection, repository selection, and work item setup flows.
Tightened update behavior for todo dates and countdown state so invalid values are handled more safely.
Refined replay-related state updates to reduce performance pressure during interactive playback.
Strengthened notification and feedback hook behavior used by workspace surfaces.
Stabilized workspace state coordination across chat history, layout, and setup-related flows.

days.summary: Work fixed command-line related handling in workspace execution and iframe URL behavior, updated the step table UI, and merged another feature-session pull request into the repository history.
frontendChangeBullets: Fixed command-line handling in workspace execution flows so command-driven work is presented more reliably.
Improved embedded URL behavior for iframe-based workspace browsing.
Updated the step table interface to make workflow status presentation clearer.
Integrated another round of session improvements into the main app experience.
Improved how workspace execution details are surfaced when command-line steps are involved.
backendChangeBullets: Fixed command-line related handling in the workspace execution path.
Improved iframe URL handling so embedded workspace views can resolve and display target pages more reliably.
Updated the supporting logic behind step table status data.
Brought additional session runtime improvements into the shared application baseline.
Strengthened workspace execution behavior for flows that depend on command output and embedded browsing.

days.summary: The codebase gained terminal rendering and workflow flow improvements, including an ANSI renderer, PR creator API and hook work, repository selection documentation/examples, flow UI wiring, action/run command collapses, status updates, and clone repository initialization fixes.
frontendChangeBullets: Added terminal output rendering with ANSI formatting so command results are easier to read inside ORGII.
Introduced flow UI improvements for actions, run commands, and workflow status updates.
Added collapsible action and run-command sections to make dense execution details easier to navigate.
Improved workflow status presentation so users can better understand what is happening during active work.
Added repository selection examples and UI wiring that clarify how users start from a chosen repository.
backendChangeBullets: Added an ANSI renderer to support richer terminal output display from command execution.
Introduced pull request creation API support for connecting workspace work with review flows.
Added hook work around pull request creation so UI actions can trigger the supporting runtime path.
Fixed clone repository initialization so new repository workspaces start more reliably.
Improved workflow flow wiring and status update handling behind action and run-command displays.

days.summary: A context-aware chat capability was added for the codebase workspace, introducing agent context APIs, PR studio API wiring, context modal and dropdown hooks/components, chat hook examples, input @-menu integration, and chat mode state.
frontendChangeBullets: Added context-aware chat so workspace conversations can reference project and agent context.
Introduced context modal controls that let users choose relevant information for a chat prompt.
Added context dropdown hooks and components for faster selection of workspace context.
Integrated an input @-menu so users can insert richer references directly while composing messages.
Added chat mode state to support switching between different workspace conversation behaviors.
backendChangeBullets: Added agent context APIs that provide structured context for workspace chat interactions.
Wired PR studio APIs into the context-aware chat capability.
Added supporting chat hook examples to clarify how context-aware conversations connect to the runtime.
Introduced state handling for chat modes so conversation behavior can be tracked consistently.
Strengthened the data path that carries selected project and agent context into workspace chat flows.

days.summary: UI fixes refined shared dropdown behavior, global styling, project and work item setup modals, launched-home layout, project/session history pages, and new workspace/window flows.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined shared dropdown behavior for a more consistent interaction pattern across the app.
Updated global styling to improve visual consistency across workspace and home surfaces.
Polished project setup modals so project creation and selection flows feel smoother.
Improved work item setup modals in the launched home experience.
Refined project history, session history, and new workspace window flows for clearer navigation.
backendChangeBullets: Improved shared component behavior that supports dropdown-driven configuration and selection flows.
Adjusted supporting state for project and work item setup modals.
Strengthened the data flow behind project history and session history pages.
Improved window-flow handling for opening new workspace experiences.
Aligned layout and state behavior across launched-home, project setup, and workspace entry paths.

days.summary: Issue tracker functionality expanded with a batch update selector and related API and tab integrations for modules and work items.
frontendChangeBullets: Added batch selection support to the issue tracker so users can update multiple work items more quickly.
Expanded module tab integrations around bulk issue management.
Improved work item tabs so batch issue actions fit more naturally into project-management workflows.
Made issue tracker interactions more efficient for users managing several related items at once.
Improved the visible workflow around selecting, reviewing, and updating issue tracker entries in groups.
backendChangeBullets: Expanded issue tracker APIs used by project-management workflows.
Added support for batch update selection in the issue tracker data path.
Improved module integration logic around bulk issue operations.
Strengthened work item tab integration with issue tracker update capabilities.
Updated project-management support code so grouped issue actions can be handled more consistently.

days.summary: A substantial workflow UI layer was introduced across the codebase workspace. The work added workflow APIs, hooks for workflow state and interactions, implement-mode selection, planner and timeline panels, realtime toolkit views, workflow center components, styling/theme updates, Tauri capability updates, routing changes, and window management support.
frontendChangeBullets: Introduced a workflow UI layer for planning, tracking, and running workspace work.
Added planner panels that help users understand upcoming workflow steps and execution intent.
Added timeline panels to make workflow progress easier to review over time.
Added realtime toolkit views and WorkflowCenter components for richer live status visibility.
Updated routing and window support so workflow experiences open cleanly inside the app.
backendChangeBullets: Added workflow APIs that support planning, tracking, and running structured workspace work.
Introduced hooks for workflow state and interactions so frontend screens can stay connected to workflow runtime data.
Added implement-mode selection support for choosing how workflow work should proceed.
Updated Tauri capabilities to support the new workflow surfaces and window behavior.
Improved orchestration support behind realtime toolkit views, workflow routing, and workspace window management.

days.summary: Workflow work item support was extended through planner milestone sidebar updates, realtime status/toolkit adjustments, workflow flow chart variants, orchestrator updates, workflow center styling, and chat item rendering changes.
frontendChangeBullets: Extended workflow support for work items with improved planner milestone sidebars.
Enhanced realtime status views so users get clearer feedback while workflow execution is underway.
Updated realtime toolkit views to better communicate active workflow activity.
Added workflow flow chart variants that make different workflow paths easier to visualize.
Improved chat item rendering around workflow updates so conversation history better reflects workflow activity.
backendChangeBullets: Updated workflow orchestrator behavior to support the expanded work item workflow experience.
Adjusted realtime status and toolkit data handling for clearer execution feedback.
Extended workflow support around planner milestone data and work item context.
Improved the underlying model for workflow flow chart variants.
Strengthened the runtime path that feeds workflow updates into WorkflowCenter styling and chat item rendering.
